# Copilot Instructions

Use the brownfield skills and references under .github/skills/ to understand this project.
Prioritize existing architecture and conventions; reuse existing code before adding new code.
When unsure, consult these references first:
- .github/skills/brownfield-developer-qa-automation-python-demo/SKILL.md
- .github/skills/brownfield-developer-qa-automation-python-demo/references/architecture.md
- .github/skills/brownfield-developer-qa-automation-python-demo/references/tech-stack.md
- .github/skills/brownfield-developer-qa-automation-python-demo/references/coding-conventions.md
- .github/skills/brownfield-developer-qa-automation-python-demo/references/module-structure.md
- .github/skills/brownfield-developer-qa-automation-python-demo/references/development-patterns.md

If requirements are ambiguous, derive EARS-style requirements using .github/skills/brownfield-ears/.
